title: BootMissionGraph
description: First-class boot mission graph. Defines phases, boot mode, and policy bundle for sovereign boot. Validated before emitting a BootProofReceipt.

phases.description: Ordered list of boot phases, each referencing a CPS packet

cps_packet_ref.description: cps_id of the CPS packet governing this phase

boot_mode.description: Highest achieved boot mode. FULL requires all phases to pass.

policy_bundle_hash.description: SHA256 fingerprint of the enforced policy bundle

schema_versions.description: Map of ABI schema name to freeze_hash fingerprint

adapter_inventory.description: List of adapter identifiers active during this boot
